title: Characterising Ly$α$ damping wings at the onset of reionisation: Evidence for highly efficient star formation driven by dense, neutral gas in UV-bright galaxies at $z>9$
summary: One of the major conundrums in contemporary extragalactic astrophysics is the apparent overabundance of a remarkable population of UV-bright galaxies at redshifts $z\gtrsim 9$. We analyse galaxies spectroscopically observed by JWST/NIRSpec Prism and confirmed to lie at $z>9$, with sufficient signal-to-noise to carefully model their rest-frame UV to optical continua and line emission. In particular, we model the damped Lyman-$α$ (Ly$α$) absorption (DLA) features of each galaxy to place observational constraints on the gas assembly of neutral atomic hydrogen (HI) onto the galaxy halos at the onset of cosmic reionisation. Based on the derived HI column densities and star-formation rate (SFR) surface densities, we show that all galaxies are highly efficient at forming stars on rapid $\sim 10-100\,$Myr depletion timescales, greatly in excess compared to the canonical local universe Kennicutt-Schmidt relation and predictions from state-of-the-art galaxy formation simulations. The dense HI gas appears to also drive the offset from the fundamental-metallicity relation of these galaxies though its dust-to-gas ratio is seemingly consistent with values derived for local galaxies except for the lowest metallicity sight-lines. Our results provide the first robust observational constraints on the impact of pristine HI gas on early galaxy assembly, and imply that a combination of highly efficient star formation and low dust obscuration can likely explain the UV-brightness of galaxies at cosmic dawn.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 当代河外天体物理学中的一个主要难题是在红移 \(z\gtrsim 9\) 处存在一个显著且数量过多的紫外明亮星系群。我们分析了由 JWST/NIRSpec Prism 光谱观测并确认位于 \(z>9\) 的星系，这些星系具有足够的信噪比，可以仔细建模其静止框架紫外到光学连续谱和发射线。特别是，我们对每个星系的阻尼莱曼-α (Lyα) 吸收 (DLA) 特征进行建模，以对宇宙再电离开始时期中性原子氢 (HI) 在星系晕上的气体聚集施加观测约束。基于推导出的 HI 柱密度和恒星形成率 (SFR) 面密度，我们表明所有星系在快速的 \(\sim 10-100\,\)Myr 消耗时标上都极其高效地形成恒星，其效率远超典型的本地宇宙 Kennicutt-Schmidt 关系和最先进的星系形成模拟的预测。致密的 HI 气体似乎也驱动了这些星系偏离基本金属丰度关系，尽管其尘埃与气体比率看似与本地星系的值一致，但最低金属丰度视线方向除外。我们的结果为原始 HI 气体对早期星系聚集的影响提供了首个稳健的观测约束，并表明高效恒星形成与低尘埃消光的结合很可能可以解释宇宙黎明时期星系的紫外亮度。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要，高密度中性氢气体驱动了早期星系的高效恒星形成，结合低尘埃消光，可以解释宇宙黎明时期紫外明亮星系的成因，为早期星系组装提供了首个观测约束。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left: Example of UV emission line and DLA fitting for JADES-GS-z13-0 (DJA ID 3215_20128771) at \(z=12.85\) . The NIRSpec/Prism spectrum and associated error are shown in green. The marked UV emission lines were modelled and then superimposed on the intrinsic spectrum before modelling the DLA (solid black line). In the inset, we show a zoom on the Ly \(\alpha\) region, with the DLA+IGM model as a solid line, and with 100% neutral IGM only ( \({x_{HI}}=1.0\) ) as a dashed line. Right: Corner plot of the posterior distributions for the DLA+IGM model, with median, 16th and 84th percentiles marked.
figures.caption_zh: 图 1：左图：对 \(z=12.85\) 处的 JADES-GS-z13-0 (DJA ID 3215_20128771) 的紫外发射线和 DLA 拟合示例。NIRSpec/Prism 光谱及相关误差以绿色显示。标记的紫外发射线被建模，然后在建模 DLA（黑色实线）之前叠加到本征光谱上。插图中，我们展示了 Ly \(\alpha\) 区域的放大图，其中 DLA+IGM 模型为实线，仅 100% 中性 IGM ( \({x_{HI}}=1.0\) ) 为虚线。右图：DLA+IGM 模型后验分布的角点图，标记了中位数、第 16 和第 84 百分位数。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Calculated column densities across the redshift range of the sample, dark green squares are well-constrained column densities with values \(N_{HI}>10^{21}\,cm^{-2}\) . Upper limits are plotted as triangles, derived from the 95th percentile of the posterior distribution. The different shaded regions represent low column density ( \(N_{HI} 10^{21-22}\,cm^{-2}\) ) where neutral hydrogen exceeds abundance from a fully neutral IGM, and very strong DLAs ( \(N_{HI}>10^{22}\,cm^{-2}\) ) with an extreme over-abundance of neutral gas. Regardless of column density, all objects are optically thick with optical depths at the Lyman limit \(\tau>10^{3}\) , with the highest column densities \(N_{HI}=10^{22}\,{cm^{-2}}\) corresponding to optical depths \(\tau\approx 10^{5}\) . Medians of well-constrained column density binned in redshift ( \(z 12\) ) are shown as black triangles (with values \(N_{HI}=10^{21.71},10^{22.24}\) , and \(10^{22.37}\,{cm^{-2}}\) respectively). These are essentially upper limits, as the fraction of IGM-dominated galaxies/upper limits (which were not included in the median) in each bin is 0.42, 0.50, and 0.29 respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图 2：样本红移范围内计算的柱密度，深绿色方块是约束良好的柱密度，其值 \(N_{HI}>10^{21}\,cm^{-2}\) 。上限以三角形绘制，源自后验分布的第 95 百分位数。不同的阴影区域代表低柱密度 ( \(N_{HI} 10^{21-22}\,cm^{-2}\) )，其中中性氢超过完全中性 IGM 的丰度，以及非常强的 DLA ( \(N_{HI}>10^{22}\,cm^{-2}\) )，具有极端过量的中性气体。无论柱密度如何，所有天体在莱曼限处都具有光学厚度 \(\tau>10^{3}\) ，最高的柱密度 \(N_{HI}=10^{22}\,{cm^{-2}}\) 对应光学深度 \(\tau\approx 10^{5}\) 。按红移分箱（ \(z 12\) ）的约束良好柱密度中位数以黑色三角形显示（值分别为 \(N_{HI}=10^{21.71},10^{22.24}\) 和 \(10^{22.37}\,{cm^{-2}}\) ）。这些本质上是上限，因为每个分箱中 IGM 主导星系/上限（未包含在中位数中）的比例分别为 0.42、0.50 和 0.29。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Measured \(\beta_{UV}\) slope and column density \({log}(N_{HI}/cm^{-2})\) for the galaxy sample. The green squares and triangles again represent the well-constrained and upper limits for column density respectively, with the grey shaded region representing possible high nebular continuum where two-photon emission may be masquerading as a DLA (Katz et al. , 2025 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图 3：星系样本的测量 \(\beta_{UV}\) 斜率和柱密度 \({log}(N_{HI}/cm^{-2})\) 。绿色方块和三角形再次分别代表柱密度的约束良好值和上限，灰色阴影区域代表可能存在的高星云连续谱，其中双光子发射可能伪装成 DLA（Katz et al. , 2025）。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Top : Cumulative histogram of derived column densities for our sample in shades of green; separated for non-DLAs (column densities \( 10^{21}\,{cm^{-2}}\) ) for \(z=9-10\) and \(z>10\) . The full sample is shown as grey shaded region, comparing directly to the averages of SERRA -simulated galaxies \(z=6-9.5\) in blue (Gelli et al. , 2025 ) , showing that while the spread of observed DLAs is broadly consistent, there is a peak of extreme-DLAs ( \(>10^{22}\,{cm^{-2}}\) ) that are not represented in the averages of simulations, particularly for those \(z>10\) . Bottom: Similar to top panel, but for a normalised PDF, along with the fraction of galaxies with unconstrained DLAs shown as an IGM limit.
figures.caption_zh: 图 4：上图：我们样本推导柱密度的累积直方图，以绿色阴影显示；按 \(z=9-10\) 和 \(z>10\) 分为非 DLA（柱密度 \( 10^{21}\,{cm^{-2}}\) ）。完整样本以灰色阴影区域显示，直接与 SERRA 模拟星系 \(z=6-9.5\) 的平均值（蓝色，Gelli et al. , 2025）进行比较，表明虽然观测到的 DLA 分布大致一致，但存在一个极端 DLA ( \(>10^{22}\,{cm^{-2}}\) ) 的峰值，这在模拟的平均值中并未体现，特别是对于 \(z>10\) 的星系。下图：与上图类似，但针对归一化概率密度函数，同时将具有未约束 DLA 的星系比例显示为 IGM 极限。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Measured UV magnitude and column density. Halo masses for our objects are derived from UV magnitudes (Mason et al. , 2023 , no dust model) . The well-constrained column densities of our sample are consistent with results from SERRA simulations (Gelli et al. , 2025 ) . The grey contours represent the average column density of 100 galaxies over random sight-lines, with the 1 \(\sigma\) error region also shown, representing the scatter across sightlines in simulations.
figures.caption_zh: 图 5：测量的紫外星等和柱密度。我们天体的晕质量源自紫外星等（Mason et al. , 2023，无尘埃模型）。我们样本的约束良好柱密度与 SERRA 模拟的结果一致（Gelli et al. , 2025）。灰色等高线代表 100 个星系在随机视线方向上的平均柱密度，同时显示了 1 \(\sigma\) 误差区域，代表模拟中不同视线方向的弥散。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Left : Upper limits for the dust-to-gas ratio \(A_{V}/N_{HI}\) against redshift, for the subsample of DLAs with \(N_{HI}>10^{21}\) cm -2 . Here, \(A_{V}\) are derived from the assumed reddening of the \(\beta_{UV}\) slope, and so are taken to be upper limits. The majority of the sample are consistent with being dust-poor, lying below 10% solar metallicity. Right : The trend of \(A_{V}/N_{HI}\) against gas-phase metallicity 12+log(O/H), compared to values from the Milky Way, Large and Small Magellanic Clouds, and 10%, 5%, and 1% metallicities (metallicity for each represented with a star). The black line shows the relation for local galaxies and gamma-ray bursts (GRBs) (Heintz et al. , 2023a ) . The method for calculating metallicity for each object is represented by different symbols; each still represents an upper limit in \(A_{V}/N_{HI}\) , and is colour-coded with lensing-corrected UV magnitude.
figures.caption_zh: 图 6：左图：对于 \(N_{HI}>10^{21}\) cm \(^{-2}\) 的 DLA 子样本，尘埃与气体比率 \(A_{V}/N_{HI}\) 随红移变化的上限。此处，\(A_{V}\) 源自 \(\beta_{UV}\) 斜率假定的红化，因此被视为上限。样本中的大多数天体与贫尘埃一致，低于 10% 太阳金属丰度。右图：\(A_{V}/N_{HI}\) 随气相金属丰度 12+log(O/H) 的变化趋势，与银河系、大麦哲伦云、小麦哲伦云以及 10%、5% 和 1% 金属丰度（每种金属丰度用星形表示）的值进行比较。黑线显示了本地星系和伽马射线暴 (GRB) 的关系（Heintz et al. , 2023a）。每个天体金属丰度的计算方法用不同符号表示；每个符号仍代表 \(A_{V}/N_{HI}\) 的上限，并根据透镜修正的紫外星等着色。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Offset from the Fundamental Metallicity Relation (FMR, Curti et al. , 2020 ) as a function of the H i column density for the sample of constrained DLAs. Binned averages for \(N_{{HI}}=10^{21-22}\) cm -2 and \(N_{{HI}}>10^{22}\) cm -2 are shown as black diamonds, with \(1\sigma\) error bars. The average offset from metallicity measurements at \(z=9-10\) (Pollock et al. , 2025 ) is shown in light green. There is only a moderate correlation, with Spearman rank \(\rho\approx-0.4\) , however the strongest DLAs tend to show large offsets from the FMR, as would be expected from pristine gas inflow dilution.
figures.caption_zh: 图 7：对于受约束 DLA 样本，偏离基本金属丰度关系 (FMR, Curti et al. , 2020) 的程度作为 H i 柱密度的函数。\(N_{{HI}}=10^{21-22}\) cm \(^{-2}\) 和 \(N_{{HI}}>10^{22}\) cm \(^{-2}\) 的分箱平均值以黑色菱形显示，并带有 \(1\sigma\) 误差棒。\(z=9-10\) 处金属丰度测量的平均偏移（Pollock et al. , 2025）以浅绿色显示。仅存在中等相关性，Spearman 等级相关系数 \(\rho\approx-0.4\) ，然而最强的 DLA 往往显示出与 FMR 的较大偏移，正如原始气体流入稀释所预期的那样。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Atomic Kennicutt-Schmidt relation of \({log}(\Sigma_{HI})\) and \({log}(\Sigma_{SFR})\) , coloured with column density values. As previously, we plot non-constrained values as upper limits (95%). We compare to the canonical Kennicutt and De Los Reyes ( 2021 ) (K21) relations for starburst and main sequence galaxies, as well as various gas consumption depletion times corresponding to global star-formation efficiency in grey (Kennicutt, 1998 , \(N=1.0\) ) . All galaxies lie above the empirical law, with some scatter, and the low column density (non-DLA) objects are extremely offset, even when plotted as upper limits. The binned means for \(\Sigma_{gas}=10^{1}-10^{2}\) , and \(10^{2}-10^{3}\,M_{\odot}\,pc^{-2}\) are shown as black diamonds, both consistent with \(\sim 10\,\) Myr. In shades of blue we compare to simulation predictions from THESAN-ZOOM at \(z=10-12\) (Shen et al. , 2026 ; Kannan et al. , 2025 ) , SERRA at \(z=7\) (Pallottini et al. , 2022 ) , and H i -only gas surface density from COLIBRE at \(z=8\) (Lagos et al. , 2025 ) . Various literature measurements are shown in grey: from ALMA detections of [O iii ] 88 \(\mu\) m and [C ii ] 158 \(\mu\) m (Vallini et al. , 2024 ) at \(z\approx 7\) , CO-based measurements for starburst ULIRGs at \(z\sim 0\) (Bouché et al. , 2007 ) , and SMGs at \(z\sim 2\) (Bothwell et al. , 2010 ; Tacconi et al. , 2008 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图 8：原子 Kennicutt-Schmidt 关系 \({log}(\Sigma_{HI})\) 和 \({log}(\Sigma_{SFR})\) ，按柱密度值着色。如前所述，我们将未约束值绘制为上限 (95%)。我们与典型的 Kennicutt and De Los Reyes (2021) (K21) 星暴星系和主序星系关系进行比较，以及与对应于全球恒星形成效率的各种气体消耗消耗时标（灰色，Kennicutt, 1998, \(N=1.0\)）。所有星系都位于经验定律之上，存在一些弥散，低柱密度（非 DLA）天体即使绘制为上限也极度偏移。\(\Sigma_{gas}=10^{1}-10^{2}\) 和 \(10^{2}-10^{3}\,M_{\odot}\,pc^{-2}\) 的分箱平均值以黑色菱形显示，两者均与 \(\sim 10\,\) Myr 一致。以蓝色阴影显示，我们与来自 THESAN-ZOOM 在 \(z=10-12\) 的模拟预测（Shen et al. , 2026；Kannan et al. , 2025）、SERRA 在 \(z=7\) 的模拟预测（Pallottini et al. , 2022）以及 COLIBRE 在 \(z=8\) 的仅 H i 气体面密度模拟预测（Lagos et al. , 2025）进行比较。各种文献测量值以灰色显示：来自 ALMA 探测到的 [O iii] 88 \(\mu\) m 和 [C ii] 158 \(\mu\) m（Vallini et al. , 2024）在 \(z\approx 7\) 处，基于 CO 的测量值用于 \(z\sim 0\) 的星暴 ULIRG（Bouché et al. , 2007），以及 \(z\sim 2\) 的 SMG（Bothwell et al. , 2010；Tacconi et al. , 2008）。

title: Evidence for Shallow Nebular Attenuation Curves and Patchy Dust Geometry at z~2 with Pa-beta/H-alpha Measurements from JWST-MegaScience Medium Band Photometry
summary: We constrain the nebular attenuation curve and investigate dust geometry in star-forming galaxies at cosmic noon using photometric medium-band emission line measurements. We measure H-alpha emission line fluxes for a sample of 209 star-forming galaxies at 1.2<z<2.4 in MegaScience/UNCOVER with stellar masses spanning $7.85<\log_{10}(M_*/M_\odot)<11.0$. For 66 of these galaxies, we also measure a Pa-beta flux. We find that the Pa-beta/H-alpha line ratio increases strongly with stellar mass and star-formation rate (SFR) across our full mass range, indicating that more massive galaxies are dustier. We compare our results with a mass-, SFR-, and redshift-matched sample of galaxies from the MOSDEF survey with spectroscopic measurements of H-alpha/H-beta, finding that a shallow Reddy et al. (2025) nebular attenuation curve is more consistent with our observations than the typically assumed Cardelli et al. (1989) attenuation curve, especially for massive galaxies. This shallow attenuation curve could be explained by low dust covering fractions in star-forming regions. Through comparison to other studies, we show that assuming this shallower attenuation curve can increase the inferred A_Halpha,neb by up to 1 magnitude at high masses. We observe no trend between A_Halpha,neb and axis ratio, indicating that nebular attenuation is likely localized to small clumps. Altogether, our results strongly suggest that dust geometry is patchy and non-uniform, especially in massive galaxies. Our results highlight the ability of JWST medium bands to probe emission lines for large samples of galaxies, and statistically constrain dust properties in upcoming large programs.

AI.tldr: 利用JWST中波段测光数据研究宇宙正午时期恒星形成星系的星云消光曲线和尘埃几何结构，发现大质量星系尘埃更多，浅的星云消光曲线更适合观测数据，表明尘埃分布呈斑块状非均匀结构。
AI.motivation: 研究宇宙正午时期（红移1.2-2.4）恒星形成星系的星云消光曲线和尘埃几何结构，了解尘埃对星系观测特性的影响，特别是大质量星系中的尘埃分布特征。
AI.method: 使用JWST/MegaScience/UNCOVER项目的中波段测光数据，测量209个恒星形成星系的Hα发射线流量，其中66个星系还测量了Paβ流量。通过分析Paβ/Hα线比与恒星质量、恒星形成率的关系，并与MOSDEF巡天的光谱数据进行比较，约束星云消光曲线。
AI.result: 发现Paβ/Hα线比随恒星质量和恒星形成率显著增加，表明大质量星系尘埃更多。观测数据更符合Reddy等人（2025）的浅星云消光曲线，而非传统的Cardelli曲线。星云消光与轴比无关，表明尘埃集中在局部斑块中。
AI.conclusion: 尘埃几何结构呈斑块状非均匀分布，特别是在大质量星系中。浅的星云消光曲线能更好地描述观测数据，使用该曲线可使高质量星系的A_Hα,neb增加达1个星等。JWST中波段数据为大规模研究星系尘埃性质提供了有力工具。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们利用光度学中波段发射线测量，约束了宇宙正午时期恒星形成星系的星云消光曲线，并研究了尘埃几何结构。我们测量了MegaScience/UNCOVER中209个恒星形成星系（红移1.2<z<2.4，恒星质量范围$7.85<\log_{10}(M_*/M_\odot)<11.0$）的H-α发射线流量。其中66个星系还测量了Pa-β流量。我们发现，在整个质量范围内，Pa-β/H-α线比随恒星质量和恒星形成率（SFR）显著增加，表明大质量星系尘埃更多。我们将结果与MOSDEF巡天中通过光谱测量H-α/H-β的星系样本（在质量、SFR和红移上匹配）进行比较，发现Reddy等人（2025）提出的浅星云消光曲线比通常假设的Cardelli等人（1989）消光曲线更符合我们的观测，尤其对于大质量星系。这种浅消光曲线可能由恒星形成区域中较低的尘埃覆盖比例解释。通过与其他研究比较，我们表明采用这种更浅的消光曲线可使高质量星系推断的A_Halpha,neb增加多达1个星等。我们未观察到A_Halpha,neb与轴比之间存在趋势，表明星云消光可能局限于小团块。总之，我们的结果强烈表明尘埃几何结构呈斑块状且非均匀，尤其在大质量星系中。我们的结果凸显了JWST中波段探测大样本星系发射线的能力，并可在未来大型项目中统计约束尘埃性质。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要总结：尘埃几何结构呈斑块状非均匀分布，特别是在大质量星系中。浅的星云消光曲线能更好地描述观测数据，使用该曲线可使高质量星系的A_Hα,neb增加达1个星等。JWST中波段数据为大规模研究星系尘埃性质提供了有力工具。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Prospector SFR vs stellar mass for the 66 galaxies in our sample with both \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) and \(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) measurements (circles, colored by redshift, green histogram), the 143 galaxies with \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) detections and \(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) upper limits (squares, black histogram), and the full UNCOVER sample (gray hexagons, gray histogram). Histograms for SFR and stellar mass for the three populations are also shown. Our sample captures galaxies down to \(\log_{10}(M_{*}/M_{\odot})=7.85\) . They span the full range of redshifts from \(1.2<z<2.4\) , and do not exhibit mass or SFR trends with redshift.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：Prospector SFR与恒星质量的关系，针对我们样本中同时具有\(\textrm{H}\alpha\)和\(\textrm{Pa}\beta\)测量的66个星系（圆圈，按红移着色，绿色直方图）、143个具有\(\textrm{H}\alpha\)探测和\(\textrm{Pa}\beta\)上限的星系（方块，黑色直方图）以及完整的UNCOVER样本（灰色六边形，灰色直方图）。还显示了三个群体的SFR和恒星质量直方图。我们的样本捕获了低至\(\log_{10}(M_{*}/M_{\odot})=7.85\)的星系。它们覆盖了\(1.2<z<2.4\)的完整红移范围，且未表现出质量或SFR随红移变化的趋势。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Measured \(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) line ratio plotted against stellar mass (left) and SFR (right). A larger line ratio implies a more dusty galaxy, although the exact conversion depends on the assumed attenuation curve. The intrinsic \(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) ratio assuming Case B recombination is 1/18 (0.056). Medians and uncertainties (orange) are computed in bins with equal numbers of galaxies from the fully-detected sample using the Turnbull ( 1976 ) estimator that accounts for the upper limits in each bin. As expected, we see a clear trend of increasing dust attenuation with increasing mass and increasing SFR.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：测量的\(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\)线比与恒星质量（左）和SFR（右）的关系。较大的线比意味着星系尘埃更多，但精确转换取决于假设的消光曲线。假设Case B复合，本征\(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\)比为1/18（0.056）。中位数和不确定性（橙色）是在完全探测样本中按等数量星系分箱，使用Turnbull（1976）估计量（考虑每箱中的上限）计算的。如预期，我们观察到尘埃消光随质量和SFR增加而增加的趋势。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Average mass, SFR, and redshift for the MegaScience data in this work with \(\log_{10}(M_{*}/M_{\odot})>9\) and the MOSDEF sample. Minima and maxima for each property are shown in small font.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：本工作中MegaScience数据（\(\log_{10}(M_{*}/M_{\odot})>9\)）和MOSDEF样本的平均质量、SFR和红移。每个属性的最小值和最大值以小字体显示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: MegaScience \(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) line ratio vs. the \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) / \(\textrm{H}\beta\) for a comparable sample of MOSDEF galaxies (see Section II.2 ). We present median line ratios from four mass bins that contain roughly equal numbers of MOSDEF galaxies, and their uncertainties are computed from bootstrapping. Predicted line ratios from the Reddy et al. ( 2025 ) and Cardelli et al. ( 1989 ) nebular attenuation curves are shown. The data are consistent with the Reddy et al. ( 2025 ) attenuation curve, particularly at high stellar masses. This consistency suggests that a shallower slope than Cardelli et al. ( 1989 ) is required at this mass and redshift regime.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：MegaScience的\(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\)线比与MOSDEF星系可比样本（见第II.2节）的\(\textrm{H}\alpha\) / \(\textrm{H}\beta\)的关系。我们展示了四个质量箱（包含大致相等数量的MOSDEF星系）的中位数线比，其不确定性通过自举法计算。显示了Reddy等人（2025）和Cardelli等人（1989）星云消光曲线预测的线比。数据与Reddy等人（2025）消光曲线一致，尤其在高恒星质量时。这种一致性表明，在此质量和红移范围内，需要比Cardelli等人（1989）更浅的斜率。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Median inferred \(A_{{\textrm{H}\alpha,{neb}}}\) values for MegaScience (orange) compared to similar studies of star-forming galaxies at cosmic noon (CANUCS, MOSDEF, and Blue Jay). All other works use \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) / \(\textrm{H}\beta\) line ratios, while MegaScience uses the redder \(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) line ratio. The \(A_{{\textrm{H}\alpha,{neb}}}\) are calculated assuming the Cardelli et al. ( 1989 ) attenuation curve (left) and the Reddy et al. ( 2025 ) attenuation curve (right). The green shaded region shows the 1 \(\sigma\) fit to the comparison samples. We see that the Cardelli et al. ( 1989 ) attenuation curve causes our MegaScience measurements to be biased systematically high (median offset: 0.50mag), while the Reddy et al. ( 2025 ) has a smaller median offset (0.34mag), especially at higher masses. We note that the different attenuation curves can cause wide variations in inferred \(A_{{\textrm{H}\alpha,{neb}}}\) for the Balmer decrement samples, with over 1 magnitude of difference in the highest mass Blue Jay bin.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：MegaScience的中位数推断\(A_{{\textrm{H}\alpha,{neb}}}\)值（橙色）与宇宙正午恒星形成星系的类似研究（CANUCS、MOSDEF和Blue Jay）的比较。所有其他工作使用\(\textrm{H}\alpha\) / \(\textrm{H}\beta\)线比，而MegaScience使用更红的\(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\)线比。\(A_{{\textrm{H}\alpha,{neb}}}\)分别假设Cardelli等人（1989）消光曲线（左）和Reddy等人（2025）消光曲线（右）计算。绿色阴影区域显示对比样本的1\(\sigma\)拟合。我们看到Cardelli等人（1989）消光曲线导致我们的MegaScience测量系统性地偏高（中位数偏移：0.50mag），而Reddy等人（2025）的中位数偏移较小（0.34mag），尤其在高质量端。我们注意到，不同的消光曲线可导致Balmer减缩样本推断的\(A_{{\textrm{H}\alpha,{neb}}}\)产生很大差异，在最高质量的Blue Jay箱中差异超过1个星等。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Measured \(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) line ratio vs axis ratio, as determined by Pysersic fits to the photometry. We do not find a trend between the line ratio and axis ratio as measured in F150W (shown), F444W, or the medium band containing \(\textrm{H}\alpha\) . Medians including the upper limits are shown in orange, with uncertainties measured through bootstrapping. The absence of any trend between dust content and inclination indicates that edge-on galaxies show similar nebular dust attenuation to face-on galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：测量的\(\textrm{Pa}\beta\) / \(\textrm{H}\alpha\)线比与轴比的关系，轴比由Pysersic对测光数据的拟合确定。我们未发现线比与F150W（所示）、F444W或包含\(\textrm{H}\alpha\)的中波段测量的轴比之间存在趋势。包含上限的中位数以橙色显示，不确定性通过自举法测量。尘埃含量与倾角之间缺乏任何趋势表明，侧向星系显示出与正面星系相似的星云尘埃消光。

title: BlastBerries: How Supernovae Affect Lyman Continuum Escape Fractions and Ionizing Photon Production in Local Analogs of High-Redshift Galaxies
summary: While compact, star-forming galaxies are believed to play a key role in cosmic reionization, the physical mechanisms enabling the escape of ionizing photons through the galactic interstellar medium remain unclear. Supernova (SN) feedback is one possible mechanism for clearing neutral gas channels to allow the escape of Lyman continuum photons. Here, we use SN discoveries in low-redshift analogs of high-redshift star-forming galaxies -- Green Pea galaxies and their even lower-redshift counterparts, Blueberry (BB) galaxies -- to understand how SNe shape the properties of their host galaxies at high redshifts. We cross-match 1242 BB galaxies with transient discovery reports and identify 11 SNe, ten of which are likely core-collapse SNe, and compare their hosts to the larger BB population. We find that SN-hosting BBs exhibit elevated star formation rates, burstier star formation histories within the last $\sim$50 Myr, and higher stellar masses. We estimate the occurrence rates of SNe in BB galaxies, finding that the SN rate may be slightly suppressed in BBs compared to field galaxies of similar mass, but we are unable to fully control for observational uncertainties. Finally, SN hosts show bluer UV slopes than non-host BB galaxies at 2.1$σ$ significance and lower ionizing photon production efficiency at 7.9$σ$ significance; the former result offers modest support for the hypothesis that SN-driven feedback plays a role in facilitating the escape of ionizing photons, while the latter may imply that SN-driven quenching decreases the rate of ionizing photon production in compact star-forming galaxies during the epoch of reionization.

AI.tldr: 研究通过分析低红移类似高红移星暴星系中的超新星，探讨超新星反馈如何影响星系性质及其对电离光子逃逸的作用。
AI.motivation: 虽然致密星暴星系在宇宙再电离过程中起关键作用，但电离光子如何通过星系星际介质逃逸的物理机制尚不清楚。超新星反馈可能是清除中性气体通道、允许莱曼连续谱光子逃逸的一种机制。
AI.method: 将1242个蓝莓星系与瞬变源发现报告进行交叉匹配，识别出11个超新星（其中10个可能是核心坍缩超新星），并将这些宿主星系与更大的蓝莓星系群体进行比较分析。
AI.result: 超新星宿主蓝莓星系表现出更高的恒星形成率、在过去约50Myr内更爆发的恒星形成历史以及更高的恒星质量。超新星宿主星系比非宿主星系具有更蓝的UV斜率（2.1σ显著性）和更低的电离光子产生效率（7.9σ显著性）。
AI.conclusion: UV斜率的结果为超新星驱动反馈在促进电离光子逃逸中起作用的假设提供了适度支持，而电离光子产生效率的降低可能意味着在再电离时期，超新星驱动的淬灭降低了致密星暴星系中电离光子的产生速率。

recommendation.reason: 论文主题为低红移蓝莓星系中的超新星反馈及其对电离光子逃逸的影响，属于再电离领域。虽然涉及高红移星系类似物和星际介质，但与用户核心兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体）的直接关联较弱。用户画像中未出现超新星、再电离等关键词，且作者匹配度低。
recommendation.topic_fit: 论文主题为超新星反馈与电离光子逃逸，属于再电离和恒星形成反馈领域。用户核心兴趣为强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体等，两者仅在‘高红移星系类似物’和‘星际介质’上有泛泛重叠，缺乏强引力透镜或高红移动力学等核心要素。
recommendation.method_fit: 方法为交叉匹配超新星巡天与蓝莓星系样本，进行统计分析。用户常用方法为引力透镜建模、高分辨率光谱/干涉成像（如ALMA、JWST）研究星系内部结构。方法类型差异较大。
recommendation.author_fit: 作者列表中仅Nicole E. Drakos出现在用户核心作者列表中（权重较低），其余作者均未出现。整体作者匹配度低。
recommendation.novelty_fit: 论文利用超新星发现研究反馈机制，具有一定新颖性，但与用户兴趣领域的新颖性方向（如利用引力透镜解析高红移星系结构）不同。
recommendation.negative_reason: 论文主题与用户核心兴趣（强引力透镜、高红移星系动力学、多相气体）关联较弱，缺乏直接匹配的关键词和作者。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 尽管致密的恒星形成星系被认为在宇宙再电离中扮演关键角色，但使电离光子能够穿过星系星际介质的物理机制仍不清楚。超新星反馈是清除中性气体通道以允许莱曼连续谱光子逃逸的可能机制之一。在此，我们利用在高红移恒星形成星系的低红移类似物——绿豌豆星系及其更低红移对应体蓝莓星系——中发现的超新星，来理解超新星如何塑造其宿主星系在高红移下的性质。我们将1242个蓝莓星系与瞬变发现报告进行交叉匹配，识别出11颗超新星，其中10颗很可能是核坍缩超新星，并将其宿主星系与更大的蓝莓星系群体进行比较。我们发现，拥有超新星的蓝莓星系表现出更高的恒星形成率、在过去约50 Myr内更剧烈的恒星形成历史以及更高的恒星质量。我们估算了蓝莓星系中超新星的发生率，发现与质量相似的场星系相比，蓝莓星系中的超新星率可能略有抑制，但我们无法完全控制观测不确定性。最后，超新星宿主星系显示出比非宿主蓝莓星系更蓝的紫外斜率（显著性为2.1σ）和更低的电离光子产生效率（显著性为7.9σ）；前者结果为超新星驱动反馈在促进电离光子逃逸中起作用的假设提供了适度支持，而后者可能意味着在再电离时期，超新星驱动的淬灭降低了致密恒星形成星系中电离光子的产生速率。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，结论如下：紫外斜率的结果为超新星驱动反馈在促进电离光子逃逸中起作用的假设提供了适度支持，而电离光子产生效率的降低可能意味着在再电离时期，超新星驱动的淬灭降低了致密星暴星系中电离光子的产生速率。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Three-color stamp images of the BB SN hosts in our sample, using grz filters from the DESI Legacy Imaging Survey (Dey et al. , 2019 ; Levi et al. , 2019 ) . The images are centered on the host galaxies, while the red crosses mark the coordinates of each SN. Redshifts are derived from SDSS catalogs, which include spectroscopically derived parameters for each host galaxy (York et al. , 2000 ) . The scale bar is given in angular size in the top left panel, where 3” corresponds to \(\sim 3\) kpc at \(z=0.05\) and \(\sim 5.5\) kpc at \(z=0.1\) . Classification information is from the Transient Name Server (TNS) when available; some SNe in our sample were never spectroscopically classified.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们样本中蓝莓星系超新星宿主的三色拼接图像，使用DESI Legacy巡天（Dey等人，2019；Levi等人，2019）的grz滤镜。图像以宿主星系为中心，红色十字标记每颗超新星的坐标。红移来自SDSS星表，其中包括每个宿主星系的光谱导出参数（York等人，2000）。比例尺以角大小显示在左上角面板中，其中3"对应于\(\sim 3\) kpc（在\(z=0.05\)处）和\(\sim 5.5\) kpc（在\(z=0.1\)处）。分类信息来自瞬变名称服务器（TNS）（如可用）；我们样本中的一些超新星从未进行光谱分类。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Sizes of the LAMOST and SDSS GP samples and the SDSS field-galaxy sample. We include the size of the full sample of galaxies and the filtered \(z<0.12\) subsets, which we address as BB galaxies and their field counterparts in this study.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：LAMOST和SDSS GP样本以及SDSS场星系样本的大小。我们包括完整星系样本的大小以及过滤后的\(z<0.12\)子集，在本研究中将其称为蓝莓星系及其场对应体。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: ZTF, ATLAS, and Pan-STARRS light curves for all SNe in our matched sample, with SN 2010ay from Sanders et al. ( 2012 ) including synthetic photometry from Gemini observations. SN candidates 2024ruy, 2020adtl, and 2023oou are excluded from our analysis. We show the best-fit STARDUST2 model for each bona fide SN (Rodney et al. , 2014 ) .
figures.caption_zh: 图2：我们匹配样本中所有超新星的ZTF、ATLAS和Pan-STARRS光变曲线，其中SN 2010ay来自Sanders等人（2012），包括来自Gemini观测的合成测光。候选体2024ruy、2020adtl和2023oou被排除在我们的分析之外。我们展示了每颗真实超新星的最佳拟合STARDUST2模型（Rodney等人，2014）。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: BB-hosted SNe, including their respective hosts, redshifts, spectroscopic classifications, and approximate absolute magnitudes at peak. The absolute magnitude for 2010ay is taken from Sanders et al. ( 2012 ) , while all others are measured from our lightcurve data. SN 2010ay, 2020aavr, and 2022emj are spectroscopically classified. The unclassified SNe are likely core-collapse SNe, which we determine using photometric classification in Section II.2 .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：蓝莓星系宿主超新星，包括各自的宿主、红移、光谱分类和峰值近似绝对星等。2010ay的绝对星等取自Sanders等人（2012），而所有其他绝对星等均来自我们的光变曲线数据。SN 2010ay、2020aavr和2022emj已进行光谱分类。未分类的超新星很可能是核坍缩超新星，我们在第II.2节中使用测光分类确定。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: SN event frequency ( \(N_{SN}/N_{total}\) ) as a function of mass for the SDSS field galaxy sample (green), the color-filtered SFG sample (blue), and the BB sample (pink). Error bars are derived from Poisson statistics for galaxies in the given stellar mass bin. The BB sample shows a lower frequency of SN events.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：超新星事件频率（\(N_{SN}/N_{total}\)）作为质量的函数，分别针对SDSS场星系样本（绿色）、颜色过滤的SFG样本（蓝色）和蓝莓星系样本（粉色）。误差线来自给定恒星质量区间内星系的泊松统计。蓝莓星系样本显示出较低的超新星事件频率。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: SN frequency for the SDSS field galaxy sample (green) and the BB sample (pink). Each sample is binned by FUV-calculated SFR, and frequency is calculated by \(N_{{SN}}/N_{{total}}\) in each bin. See the Figure 3 caption for additional details.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：SDSS场星系样本（绿色）和蓝莓星系样本（粉色）的超新星频率。每个样本按FUV计算的SFR分箱，频率由每个箱中的\(N_{{SN}}/N_{{total}}\)计算。其他细节见图3说明。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Corner plot showing galaxy properties of BB galaxies and BB SN hosts, measured from the SDSS spectroscopic pipeline. Properties include the H \(\alpha\) -inferred SFR, electron density, metallicity, and stellar mass. The contours displayed correspond to the \(0.5,1,1.5,2\sigma\) levels. The unclassified SNe are marked with brown “x” markers, while the classified Type Ia and Type II SNe are marked with orange and pink stars, respectively. Dotted lines represent the population means. Top labels give the medians of each property for the BB galaxies, with error bars corresponding to the 16th and 84th percentiles.

title: Subaru High-$z$ Exploration of Low-Luminosity Quasars (SHELLQs). XXV. Large-scale environments of low-luminosity quasars at $z\sim6$ traced by Ly$α$ emitters
summary: High-$z$ quasars are believed to reside in massive dark matter haloes (DMHs), suggesting that they reside in galaxy overdense regions. However, previous observations have shown a range of environments around them. The previous targets are limited to bright quasars ($M_{1450}\lesssim-25$), for which photoevaporation may hinder galaxy formation in their vicinity. Here, we present Subaru/Hyper-Suprime Cam observations of the environments of four low-luminosity quasars ($-24<M_{1450}<-22$) at $z\sim6.18$, which are expected to have a smaller photoevaporation effect. We detect Lyman $α$ emitters (LAEs) around them with narrowband NB872 imaging, and measure the local LAE overdensity. One quasar (J0844$-$0132) resides in an overdense region ($δ_\mathrm{LAE}=3.77\pm0.97$), whereas the other three fields are consistent with normal fields. The result is confirmed over the proximity zone of each quasar, suggesting that the diverse environment around quasars is independent of photoevaporation. We find no significant correlation between the LAE overdensities and the properties of host galaxies and supermassive black holes. Our quasars have host stellar mass measurements from JWST, allowing us to compare them with the LAE overdensity around galaxies without quasar activity with comparable stellar masses. We find that the LAE overdensity in the J0844$-$0132 field is stronger than that of galaxies with similar stellar mass at $z\sim6$, while the other quasar fields show a comparable LAE overdensity.

AI.tldr: 研究观测了4个z~6.18的低光度类星体周围环境，发现其中一个位于LAE过密区，其他三个环境正常，表明类星体环境的多样性不依赖于光蒸发效应。
AI.motivation: 高红移类星体被认为存在于大质量暗物质晕中，但先前观测显示其周围环境存在多样性。先前研究限于亮类星体，其光蒸发效应可能抑制邻近星系形成。本研究旨在探索低光度类星体（预期光蒸发效应较小）周围的环境。
AI.method: 使用Subaru/Hyper-Suprime Cam观测4个z~6.18的低光度类星体（-24<M1450<-22），通过窄带NB872成像探测周围的莱曼α发射体（LAE），测量局部LAE过密度。同时利用JWST测量类星体宿主星系恒星质量。
AI.result: 一个类星体（J0844-0132）位于显著过密区域（δ_LAE=3.77±0.97），其他三个场与正常场一致。结果在类星体邻近区内得到确认，表明类星体环境的多样性不依赖于光蒸发效应。未发现LAE过密度与宿主星系或超大质量黑洞性质间的显著相关性。J0844-0132场的LAE过密度强于z~6具有相似恒星质量的非活动星系，其他类星体场则显示相当的过密度。
AI.conclusion: 低光度类星体周围环境存在多样性，其中一个位于显著过密区，其他环境正常。这种多样性独立于光蒸发效应，且与宿主星系性质无显著相关性。部分类星体可能确实位于星系过密区，但并非所有类星体都如此。

title: Status of the $S_8$ Tension: A 2026 Review of Probe Discrepancies
summary: The parameter $S_8 \equiv σ_8 (Ω_m/0.3)^{0.5}$ quantifies the amplitude of matter density fluctuations. A persistent discrepancy exists between early-universe CMB observations and late-universe probes. This review assesses the ``$S_8$ tension'' against a new 2026 baseline: a unified ``Combined CMB'' framework incorporating Planck, ACT DR6, and SPT-3G. This combined analysis yields $S_8 = 0.836^{+0.012}_{-0.013}$, providing a higher central value and reduced uncertainties compared to Planck alone. Compiling measurements from 2019--2026, we reveal a striking bifurcation: DES Year 6 results exhibit a statistically significant tension of $2.4σ$--$2.7σ$ \citep{DESY6}, whereas KiDS Legacy results demonstrate statistical consistency at $<1σ$ \citep{Wright2025}. We examine systematic origins of this dichotomy, including photometric redshift calibration, intrinsic alignment modeling, and shear measurement pipelines. We further contextualize these findings with cluster counts (where eROSITA favors high values while SPT favors low), galaxy-galaxy lensing, and redshift-space distortions. The heterogeneous landscape suggests survey-specific systematic effects contribute substantially to observed discrepancies, though new physics beyond $Λ$CDM cannot be excluded.

AI.tldr: 该综述评估了S8参数张力问题，基于2026年新基线数据发现DES Year 6与KiDS Legacy结果存在显著分歧，表明观测系统误差可能是主要因素。
AI.motivation: 早期宇宙CMB观测与晚期宇宙探测在S8参数上存在持续差异，需要基于最新观测数据重新评估这一张力问题。
AI.method: 建立统一的"Combined CMB"框架整合Planck、ACT DR6和SPT-3G数据；编译2019-2026年测量结果；分析DES Year 6和KiDS Legacy结果的分歧；考察光测红移校准、内禀排列建模、剪切测量等系统误差。
AI.result: Combined CMB分析得到S8=0.836±0.013；DES Year 6显示2.4σ-2.7σ显著张力，而KiDS Legacy结果在1σ内一致；不同探测方法（星系团计数、星系-星系透镜、红移空间畸变）结果存在异质性。
AI.conclusion: 观测到的差异主要源于特定巡天的系统误差，但ΛCDM模型之外的新物理可能性仍不能排除。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 参数 \(S_8 \equiv σ_8 (Ω_m/0.3)^{0.5}\) 量化了物质密度涨落的幅度。早期宇宙的宇宙微波背景（CMB）观测与晚期宇宙探针之间存在持续差异。本综述基于新的2026年基线评估了“\(S_8\) 张力”：一个统一的“组合CMB”框架，整合了Planck、ACT DR6和SPT-3G。该组合分析得出 \(S_8 = 0.836^{+0.012}_{-0.013}\)，与单独Planck相比提供了更高的中心值和更小的不确定性。汇总2019–2026年的测量结果，我们揭示了一个显著的分叉：DES第六年结果显示出统计显著的张力，为 \(2.4σ\)–\(2.7σ\) \citep{DESY6}，而KiDS Legacy结果则显示出统计一致性，低于 \(1σ\) \citep{Wright2025}。我们考察了这种二分法的系统起源，包括光度红移校准、本征对齐建模和剪切测量流程。我们进一步将这些发现与星系团计数（其中eROSITA倾向于高值，而SPT倾向于低值）、星系-星系透镜和红移空间畸变联系起来。这种异质性图景表明，特定巡天的系统效应在很大程度上导致了观测到的差异，尽管不能排除ΛCDM之外的新物理。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，观测到的差异主要源于特定巡天的系统误差，但ΛCDM模型之外的新物理可能性仍不能排除。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Compilation of \(S_{8}\) measurements from major cosmological surveys (2019–2026). The horizontal gray band represents the \(1\sigma\) confidence interval of the Combined CMB baseline (Planck + ACT DR6 + SPT-3G), centered at \(S_{8}=0.836\) with asymmetric width \({}^{+0.012}_{-0.013}\) . The dashed gray line indicates the central value. Note the systematic offset between DES results (red circles), which lie consistently below the CMB band, and KiDS Legacy results (blue circles), which have migrated upward into consistency with the CMB. The eROSITA cluster count measurement (orange triangle, upper region) uniquely favors a clustering amplitude exceeding the CMB baseline. Error bars represent \(1\sigma\) uncertainties as reported; asymmetric uncertainties are shown faithfully.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：主要宇宙学巡天（2019–2026）的 \(S_{8}\) 测量汇编。水平灰色带表示组合CMB基线（Planck + ACT DR6 + SPT-3G）的 \(1\sigma\) 置信区间，中心值为 \(S_{8}=0.836\)，非对称宽度为 \({}^{+0.012}_{-0.013}\) 。灰色虚线表示中心值。注意DES结果（红色圆圈）与KiDS Legacy结果（蓝色圆圈）之间的系统偏移：DES结果始终低于CMB带，而KiDS Legacy结果已向上移动至与CMB一致。eROSITA星系团计数测量（橙色三角形，上部区域）独特地支持聚类振幅超过CMB基线。误差棒表示报告的 \(1\sigma\) 不确定性；非对称不确定性已如实显示。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Comprehensive compilation of \(S_{8}\) measurements and their tension with the Combined CMB baseline ( \(S_{8}=0.836^{+0.012}_{-0.013}\) ). Tensions are computed using the uncertainty in the direction of the discrepancy for asymmetric errors. Negative values indicate \(S_{8}\) above the baseline.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：\(S_{8}\) 测量及其与组合CMB基线（ \(S_{8}=0.836^{+0.012}_{-0.013}\) ）张力的全面汇编。对于非对称误差，张力使用差异方向上的不确定性计算。负值表示 \(S_{8}\) 高于基线。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Weighted mean \(S_{8}\) per year of publication (blue squares) computed from all late-universe measurements in Table LABEL:tab:s8_measurements , excluding CMB baselines. Individual measurements are shown as gray points. The red band denotes the \(1\sigma\) interval of the Combined CMB baseline ( \(S_{8}=0.836^{+0.012}_{-0.013}\) ). For asymmetric uncertainties, the symmetrized error \(\sigma_{sym}=\sqrt{(\sigma_{+}^{2}+\sigma_{-}^{2})/2}\) is used to compute inverse-variance weights. The number of measurements per year is indicated below each point, and the tension with the Combined CMB baseline above. The high 2024 mean ( \(0.3\sigma\) ) is driven by the eROSITA cluster count result ( \(S_{8}=0.86\pm 0.01\) ), which dominates the inverse-variance weighting; the 2026 mean is dominated by the DES Y6 results. Correlations between measurements sharing underlying data are not accounted for.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：每年出版物的加权平均 \(S_{8}\)（蓝色方块），基于表LABEL:tab:s8_measurements中所有晚期宇宙测量（不包括CMB基线）计算。单个测量值以灰色点显示。红色带表示组合CMB基线（ \(S_{8}=0.836^{+0.012}_{-0.013}\) ）的 \(1\sigma\) 区间。对于非对称不确定性，使用对称化误差 \(\sigma_{sym}=\sqrt{(\sigma_{+}^{2}+\sigma_{-}^{2})/2}\) 计算逆方差权重。每年测量次数在每个点下方标出，与组合CMB基线的张力在点上方标出。2024年的高平均值（ \(0.3\sigma\) ）由eROSITA星系团计数结果（ \(S_{8}=0.86\pm 0.01\) ）驱动，该结果主导了逆方差加权；2026年的平均值由DES Y6结果主导。共享底层数据的测量之间的相关性未予考虑。

title: The faint end of the UV luminosity function at $0.4 < z < 0.7$ from the Hubble Frontier Fields
comment: 16 pages, 10 figures. Accepted for publication in ApJ
summary: By extending the Hubble Frontier Fields (HFF) observations to the F225W band using HST WFC3/UVIS, we measure the rest-frame UV luminosity function (LF) of galaxies at $0.4 < z < 0.7$, pushing into the low-luminosity galaxy regime. In this first paper of a series, we describe the HST Cycle-27 GO-15940 F225W observations and data reduction, and present a corresponding catalog for the Abell 2744 field, which is the most data-rich HFF cluster field. Combining deep Near-UV imaging and the high magnification from strong gravitational lensing of the foreground cluster, we identify 152 faint galaxies with $-19.5 < M_{UV} < -12.1$ at $0.4 < z < 0.7$ through hybrid photometric-spectroscopic redshift selection from the Abell 2744 F225W catalog. Using a sample defined by a $50\%$ completeness cut and applying the maximum likelihood estimation, we derive the best-fit Schechter parameters for the UV LF at $z \sim 0.55$ down to $M_\text{UV} < -13.5$ mag, including a faint-end slope of $α= -1.324^{+0.072}_{-0.074}$. We incorporate a curvature parameter $δ$ in parameter estimation to account for a possible turn-over at the faint end of the UV LF, leveraging the exceedingly low luminosities probed by our sample. Our results rule out a turn-over brighter than $M_{UV} = -15.5$ at the $3σ$ confidence level.

AI.tldr: 利用哈勃前沿场F225W波段观测数据，测量了红移0.4-0.7星系的紫外光度函数，探测到低光度星系，排除了在M_UV=-15.5处存在拐点的可能性。
AI.motivation: 通过扩展哈勃前沿场观测到F225W波段，结合强引力透镜效应，探测红移0.4-0.7的低光度星系，研究紫外光度函数的暗端特性，特别是检验暗端是否存在拐点。
AI.method: 使用HST WFC3/UVIS的F225W波段观测数据，结合Abell 2744星系团的强引力透镜放大效应，通过混合光测-光谱红移选择方法识别了152个暗星系，采用最大似然估计拟合Schechter函数参数，并引入曲率参数δ来检验光度函数暗端可能的拐点。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 通过将哈勃前沿场（HFF）的观测扩展到F225W波段，利用HST WFC3/UVIS，我们测量了红移0.4 < z < 0.7处星系的静止帧紫外光度函数（LF），并深入研究了低光度星系区域。在本系列的第一篇论文中，我们描述了HST Cycle-27 GO-15940 F225W观测和数据处理，并提供了Abell 2744场（数据最丰富的HFF星团场）的相应星表。结合深近紫外成像和前景星团强引力透镜产生的高放大率，我们通过混合测光-光谱红移选择，从Abell 2744 F225W星表中识别出152个暗弱星系，其M_{UV}范围为-19.5 < M_{UV} < -12.1，红移为0.4 < z < 0.7。利用由50%完备性截断定义的样本，并应用最大似然估计，我们推导出z ~ 0.55处、M_\text{UV} < -13.5星等以下的紫外LF的最佳拟合Schechter参数，包括暗端斜率α= -1.324^{+0.072}_{-0.074}。我们在参数估计中引入曲率参数δ，以考虑紫外LF暗端可能的拐点，并利用样本探测到的极低光度。我们的结果在3σ置信水平上排除了M_{UV} = -15.5以上亮度的拐点。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，该研究成功探测到红移0.4-0.7的低光度星系，为理解星系形成和演化提供了重要约束，特别是排除了紫外光度函数暗端在较亮光度处存在拐点的可能性。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Rest-frame UV LF for galaxies at \(z\sim 0.55\) in the Abell 2744 field. The best-fit Schechter function from our MLE is plotted as a black solid curve, with the surrounding gray band indicating its \(3\sigma\) uncertainty range. For reference, a black dashed line extends our best-fit model to brighter magnitudes, where direct constraints from our data are absent, to aid comparison with other studies. The observed, binned LF (shown as black squares) is provided for visual assessment only. Various literature measurements at similar redshifts are overplotted as colored lines, as detailed in the legend. The inset panel presents the joint constraints on the Schechter parameters, the faint-end slope \(\alpha\) and the characteristic magnitude \(M^{*}\) . Green lines mark the median (best-fit) values reported in Table 3 , while the black contours enclose the \(1\sigma\) (0.393) and \(2\sigma\) (0.865) confidence regions.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：Abell 2744场中红移\(z\sim 0.55\)处星系的静止帧紫外LF。来自MLE的最佳拟合Schechter函数以黑色实线绘制，周围的灰色带表示其3σ不确定范围。作为参考，黑色虚线将我们的最佳拟合模型延伸到更亮星等（我们的数据缺乏直接约束），以便与其他研究进行比较。观测到的分箱LF（以黑色方块显示）仅供视觉评估。不同红移处的各种文献测量结果以彩色线条叠加，详见图例。内嵌面板展示了Schechter参数（暗端斜率α和特征星等M^{*}）的联合约束。绿色线标记了表3中报告的中位（最佳拟合）值，而黑色等高线包围了1σ（0.393）和2σ（0.865）置信区域。

title: A Multiwavelength Evaluation of AGN in the Post-Starburst Phase
comment: 21 pages, 13 figures; Accepted for publication by ApJ
summary: The quenching of star formation is a crucial phase in galaxy evolution. Although active galactic nuclei (AGN) feedback has been proposed as a key driver of this transition, the lack of strong AGN in nearby quenching galaxies raises questions about its effectiveness. In this study, we investigate AGN activity in post-starburst galaxies (PSBs), star-forming galaxies (SFGs), and quiescent galaxies (QGs) at $z<$ 0.2, using multiwavelength data from eROSITA/eFEDS (X-ray), WISE (mid-infrared), and FIRST (radio). We assess AGN incidence and strength across different stages and apply stacking techniques to undetected galaxies to recover average AGN properties. Comparisons between observed luminosity and that expected from star formation (L$_{\rm obs}$/L$_{\rm SF}$) show that PSBs are consistent with star formation dominating their radio and X-ray emission. Although PSBs exhibit a MIR AGN incidence rate twice that of SFGs, their estimated AGN luminosities are small compared to those of MIR AGN in the literature. PSBs overall do not display significantly enhanced AGN emission relative to mass- and redshift-matched SFGs and QGs. While the presence of obscured, low-luminosity AGN in PSBs cannot be excluded, such AGN, if present, could be fueled by residual gas from the preceding starburst and may not play a dominant role in quenching. Our findings suggest that AGN's role in quenching at low redshift is more subtle than violently removing the gas -- the feedback is likely more "preventive" than "ejective".

AI.tldr: 该研究通过多波段数据分析了低红移(z<0.2)后星暴星系、恒星形成星系和静止星系中的活动星系核活动，发现后星暴星系的AGN活动并不显著增强，其AGN在星系淬灭过程中可能扮演更"预防性"而非"喷出性"的角色。
AI.motivation: 虽然活动星系核反馈被认为是星系淬灭的关键驱动因素，但在附近淬灭星系中缺乏强AGN的证据，这引发了对其有效性的质疑。本研究旨在探究AGN在不同演化阶段星系中的活动情况。
AI.method: 使用eROSITA/eFEDS的X射线数据、WISE的中红外数据和FIRST的射电数据，分析z<0.2的后星暴星系、恒星形成星系和静止星系。通过评估AGN发生率和强度，并对未探测到的星系应用叠加技术来恢复平均AGN性质。
AI.result: 后星暴星系的射电和X射线辐射主要由恒星形成主导。虽然后星暴星系的中红外AGN发生率是恒星形成星系的两倍，但其估计的AGN光度远小于文献中的中红外AGN。总体上，后星暴星系相对于质量和红移匹配的恒星形成星系和静止星系，并未显示出显著增强的AGN辐射。
AI.conclusion: 后星暴星系中可能存在被遮蔽的低光度AGN，这些AGN可能由先前星暴的残余气体提供燃料，但在淬灭过程中可能不起主导作用。研究结果表明，在低红移下，AGN在淬灭中的作用比剧烈移除气体更为微妙——反馈更可能是"预防性"而非"喷出性"的。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 恒星形成的淬灭是星系演化的关键阶段。尽管活动星系核反馈被认为是这一转变的关键驱动因素，但邻近淬灭星系中缺乏强活动星系核的现象对其有效性提出了质疑。本研究利用eROSITA/eFEDS（X射线）、WISE（中红外）和FIRST（射电）的多波段数据，研究了红移$z<$ 0.2的后星暴星系、恒星形成星系和宁静星系中的活动星系核活动。我们评估了不同阶段的活动星系核发生率与强度，并对未探测到的星系应用叠加技术以恢复平均活动星系核性质。观测光度与恒星形成预期光度（L$_{\rm obs}$/L$_{\rm SF}$）的比较表明，后星暴星系的射电和X射线辐射主要由恒星形成主导。尽管后星暴星系的中红外活动星系核发生率是恒星形成星系的两倍，但其估计的活动星系核光度与文献中的中红外活动星系核相比很小。总体而言，后星暴星系相对于质量和红移匹配的恒星形成星系和宁静星系，并未表现出显著增强的活动星系核辐射。虽然不能排除后星暴星系中存在被遮蔽的低光度活动星系核，但此类活动星系核（如果存在）可能由先前星暴的残余气体提供燃料，并且在淬灭过程中可能不起主导作用。我们的发现表明，在低红移下，活动星系核在淬灭中的作用比剧烈移除气体更为微妙——反馈更可能是“预防性”而非“喷出性”的。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：后星暴星系中可能存在被遮蔽的低光度AGN，这些AGN可能由先前星暴的残余气体提供燃料，但在淬灭过程中可能不起主导作用。研究结果表明，在低红移下，AGN在淬灭中的作用比剧烈移除气体更为微妙——反馈更可能是"预防性"而非"喷出性"的。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Left: The distribution of SFGs, PSBs and QGs on the H \(\delta_{A}\) vs. Dn4000 plot. Middle: [O III]/H \(\beta\) vs. [N II]/H \(\alpha\) BPT diagram. The dashed and solid lines are demarcation lines for SF and AGN ionization, from Kauffmann et al. ( 2003a ) and Kewley et al. ( 2001 ) , respectively. Only galaxies with SNR \(\geqslant\) 3 for all four emission lines are shown. QGs are selected to have minimal emission (Section II.1.2 ) and therefore not plotted here. Right: Stellar mass vs. redshift for the PSB sample and mass- and redshift-matched comparison samples of SFGs and QGs. The vertical and diagonal aggregations of QGs in this panel are not biases introduced by the matching process. See Section II.1.2 and Appendix A for more details.

title: The ALMA-QUARKS Survey: Discovery of Dusty Fibrils inside Massive Star-forming Clumps
summary: We report the discovery of more than 323 superfine dusty filamentary structures (fibrils) inside 121 massive star forming clumps that are located in widely different Galactic environments (Galactocentric distances of $\sim$0.5-12.7 kpc). These fibrils are identified from the 1.3~mm continuum emission in the ALMA-QUARKS survey, which has a linear resolution of $\sim900$ AU for a source at $\sim$3 kpc, using the \textit{FilFinder} software. Using \textit{RadFil} software, we find that the typical width of these fibrils is $\sim$0.01 pc, which is about ten times narrower than that of dusty filaments in nearby clouds identified by the \textit{Herschel} Space Observatory. The mass ($M$) versus length ($L$) relation for these fibrils follows $M\propto L^{2}$, similar to that of Galactic filaments identified in space (e.g., \textit{Herschel}) and ground-based single-dish (e.g., \textit{APEX}) surveys. However, these fibrils are significantly denser ($\mathrm{N_{H_2} = 10^{23}-10^{24}\ cm^{-2}}$) than the filaments found in previous \textit{Herschel} surveys ($\mathrm{N_{H_2} = 10^{20}-10^{23}\ cm^{-2}}$). This work contributes a large sample of superfine fibrils in massive clumps, following the identification of large 0.1-pc wide filaments and associated internal velocity coherent fibers in nearby molecular clouds, further emphasizing the crucial role played by filamentary structures in star formation at various physical scales.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们报告了在121个大质量恒星形成团块中发现了超过323条超细的尘埃纤维结构（纤维），这些团块位于银河系内广泛不同的环境中（银心距约为0.5-12.7 kpc）。这些纤维是利用ALMA-QUARKS巡天中1.3毫米连续辐射识别出来的，该巡天对于距离约3 kpc的源具有约900 AU的线性分辨率，识别过程使用了FilFinder软件。利用RadFil软件，我们发现这些纤维的典型宽度约为0.01 pc，比赫歇尔空间天文台在邻近云中发现的尘埃纤维窄约十倍。这些纤维的质量（M）与长度（L）关系遵循M∝L²，类似于在空间（如赫歇尔）和地面单口径（如APEX）巡天中识别出的银河系纤维。然而，这些纤维的密度（N_{H_2} = 10^{23}-10^{24} cm^{-2}）显著高于先前赫歇尔巡天中发现的纤维（N_{H_2} = 10^{20}-10^{23} cm^{-2}）。这项工作提供了大质量团块中超细纤维的大样本，继在邻近分子云中识别出0.1 pc宽的纤维及相关内部速度相干纤维之后，进一步强调了纤维结构在不同物理尺度恒星形成中的关键作用。

title: Time delays and stationarity in quasar light curves
summary: We present a fully Bayesian framework for time delay inference and stationarity tests in quasar light curves using marginalised Gaussian processes. The model separates a deterministic, non-stationary drift (piecewise linear mean) from stationary stochastic variability (Matérn and Spectral Mixture kernels), and jointly models multiple images with per-image microlensing. Bayesian evidence and parameter posteriors are obtained via nested sampling and marginalised over model choices. Applied to the quasars WFI J2033 - 4723, B 1608 + 656, and HE 0435 - 1223, we find strong evidence for non-stationarity in B 1608 + 656 and HE 0435 - 1223, while WFI J2033 - 4723 is consistent with stationarity. The stochastic component favours an Markovian exponential kernel for B 1608 + 656 and a non-Markovian Matérn-$\frac32$ kernel for WFI J2033 - 4723 and HE 0435 - 1223. Multi-length-scale Spectral Mixture kernels are disfavoured. Time delays are shown to be robust to model assumptions and consistent with prior work within the error. We further identify and mitigate a likelihood pathology which biases toward large delays, providing a practical nested sampling convergence protocol.

AI.tldr: 提出基于边缘化高斯过程的贝叶斯框架，用于类星体光变曲线的时间延迟推断和平稳性检验，分离确定性非平稳漂移与平稳随机变化，联合建模多图像微引力透镜效应。
AI.motivation: 传统时间延迟分析方法通常假设光变曲线是平稳的，但实际观测中可能存在非平稳性（如长期漂移），这会影响时间延迟推断的准确性。需要开发能够同时处理平稳性和非平稳性的统计框架。
AI.method: 使用完全贝叶斯框架，将光变曲线分解为确定性非平稳漂移（分段线性均值）和平稳随机变化（Matérn和谱混合核函数）。通过嵌套采样进行边缘化，获得贝叶斯证据和参数后验分布，联合建模多图像并考虑每幅图像的微引力透镜效应。
AI.result: 应用于WFI J2033-4723、B 1608+656和HE 0435-1223三个类星体：B 1608+656和HE 0435-1223显示强烈非平稳性证据，WFI J2033-4723与平稳性一致。随机分量偏好：B 1608+656使用马尔可夫指数核，其他两个使用非马尔可夫Matérn-3/2核。多长度尺度谱混合核不被支持。时间延迟结果对模型假设稳健，与先前工作一致。
AI.conclusion: 该贝叶斯框架能有效识别光变曲线的平稳性特征，提供可靠的时间延迟估计。通过解决似然函数病理问题并建立嵌套采样收敛协议，提高了推断的准确性。方法适用于引力透镜时间延迟宇宙学应用。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个完全贝叶斯框架，用于类星体光变曲线的时间延迟推断和平稳性检验，该框架使用边缘化高斯过程。该模型将确定性、非平稳漂移（分段线性均值）与平稳随机变异性（Matérn和谱混合核）分开，并联合建模多个图像及其每个图像的微引力透镜效应。通过嵌套采样获得贝叶斯证据和参数后验，并在模型选择上进行边缘化。应用于类星体WFI J2033 - 4723、B 1608 + 656和HE 0435 - 1223，我们发现B 1608 + 656和HE 0435 - 1223存在非平稳性的强证据，而WFI J2033 - 4723与平稳性一致。随机成分倾向于B 1608 + 656的马尔可夫指数核，以及WFI J2033 - 4723和HE 0435 - 1223的非马尔可夫Matérn-\frac32核。多尺度谱混合核不被支持。时间延迟对模型假设具有稳健性，并且在误差范围内与先前工作一致。我们进一步识别并缓解了一种偏向大延迟的似然函数病理问题，提供了一个实用的嵌套采样收敛协议。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：该贝叶斯框架能有效识别光变曲线的平稳性特征，提供可靠的时间延迟估计。通过解决似然函数病理问题并建立嵌套采样收敛协议，提高了推断的准确性。方法适用于引力透镜时间延迟宇宙学应用。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Priors set on the parameters of the flux variability model. All priors are uniform in the ranges shown. “Sorted” indicates that a sorted-uniform prior [ 90 , 91 ] was used. The top set of parameters corresponds to the time delays, the middle set to the mean function and the bottom set to the covariance matrix. The prior on the time delay \(\Delta t\) was set differently for the WFI J2033 – 4723 and B 1608 + 656 \((1)\) and HE 0435 – 1223 \((2)\) data sets, respectively. The range of \(t\) -values of the light curves is denoted by \(\Delta t_{{range}}=t_{n_{{data}}}-t_{1}\) , mean and std denote the mean and standard deviation of time delays reported in Hojjati et al. [ 22 ] , \(\bar{\mathbf{y}}_{{A}}\) is the average of the magnitudes \(\mathbf{y}_{{A}}\) of light curve A and \(f_{{Nyquist}}\) is the Nyquist frequency computed from \(t_{1},\dots,t_{n_{{data}}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：通量变异性模型参数设定的先验。所有先验在所示范围内均匀分布。“排序”表示使用了排序均匀先验[90, 91]。顶部参数集对应时间延迟，中间参数集对应均值函数，底部参数集对应协方差矩阵。时间延迟\(\Delta t\)的先验分别针对WFI J2033 – 4723和B 1608 + 656 \((1)\)以及HE 0435 – 1223 \((2)\)数据集设定。光变曲线\(t\)值的范围记为\(\Delta t_{{range}}=t_{n_{{data}}}-t_{1}\)，mean和std表示Hojjati等人[22]报告的时间延迟的均值和标准差，\(\bar{\mathbf{y}}_{{A}}\)是光变曲线A的星等\(\mathbf{y}_{{A}}\)的平均值，\(f_{{Nyquist}}\)是根据\(t_{1},\dots,t_{n_{{data}}}\)计算的奈奎斯特频率。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Evidence \(\log Z\) , posterior-averaged log-likelihood \(\langle\log L\rangle_{P}\) and KL -divergence \(D_{{KL}}\) for the three quasar light curve data sets. The three quantities are related by Occam’s razor equation, \(\log Z=\langle\log L\rangle_{P}-D_{{KL}}\) . Each coloured square in a subplot corresponds to a GP fit, performed with a given number of knots \(n_{{fk}}\) in the flexknot mean function and a given GP kernel. Zero and one knots correspond to a fixed and constant mean (with the constant a parameter), respectively. Note that the numbers in brackets denotes the standard deviation on the last digits. As shown by the KL -divergence, model complexity increases roughly from the top left to the bottom right corner. The goodness of fit, \(\langle\log L\rangle_{P}\) , roughly shows the opposite trend, with more complex models producing better fits. As the balance of these two, the evidence \(\log Z\) shows an overall preference to the E and M32 kernels. Non-stationarity (more than one knot) is preferred for B 1608 + 656 and HE 0435 – 1223 , whereas there is no clear indication of non-stationarity for WFI J2033 – 4723 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：三个类星体光变曲线数据集的证据\(\log Z\)、后验平均对数似然\(\langle\log L\rangle_{P}\)和KL散度\(D_{{KL}}\)。这三个量通过奥卡姆剃刀方程\(\log Z=\langle\log L\rangle_{P}-D_{{KL}}\)相关联。子图中的每个彩色方块对应一个GP拟合，该拟合使用flexknot均值函数中给定数量的节点\(n_{{fk}}\)和给定的GP核进行。零个和一个节点分别对应固定均值和常数均值（常数作为一个参数）。注意，括号中的数字表示最后一位数字的标准差。如KL散度所示，模型复杂度大致从左上角到右下角增加。拟合优度\(\langle\log L\rangle_{P}\)大致呈现相反趋势，更复杂的模型产生更好的拟合。作为这两者的平衡，证据\(\log Z\)总体上倾向于E和M32核。对于B 1608 + 656和HE 0435 – 1223，非平稳性（多于一个节点）更受青睐，而对于WFI J2033 – 4723，则没有明确的非平稳性指示。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: GP (left column) and mean function (right column) posterior predictive distributions for the three quasar light curve data sets, each consisting of a number of light curves: A, B, C and (if existing) D. The GP is the sum of the deterministic mean function and the stochastic contribution from the GP kernel, which are fit jointly to the data. Plotting just the mean function therefore extracts the non-stationarity of the GP . The fits are marginalised over all choices in Figure 1 . Visually, the mean function of WFI J2033 – 4723 is consistent with a constant, whereas for B 1608 + 656 and HE 0435 – 1223 , the mean function is clearly non-stationary. Note that the full GP on the right reverts to the mean function outside the observation window, i.e. extrapolation is dictated by the mean function. The time axis is set to zero at the first observation.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：三个类星体光变曲线数据集的GP（左列）和均值函数（右列）后验预测分布，每个数据集包含若干条光变曲线：A、B、C和（如果存在）D。GP是确定性均值函数和来自GP核的随机贡献之和，两者联合拟合数据。因此，仅绘制均值函数可以提取GP的非平稳性。拟合是在图1中所有选择上边缘化的。从视觉上看，WFI J2033 – 4723的均值函数与常数一致，而对于B 1608 + 656和HE 0435 – 1223，均值函数明显是非平稳的。注意，右侧的完整GP在观测窗口之外回归到均值函数，即外推由均值函数决定。时间轴在第一次观测处设为零。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Corner plots of the time delay posteriors for the three data sets. The posteriors are marginalised over all model choices in Figure 2 . For comparison, the inferred values (mean and standard deviation) from Hojjati et al. [ 22 ] are overplotted. All posteriors are unimodal and well-constrained, with the exception of \(\Delta t_{{AB}}\) of B 1608 + 656 , which displays a weakly protruding secondary peak. The numerical means and standard deviations are also shown in Table 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图3：三个数据集的时间延迟后验的角落图。后验是在图2中所有模型选择上边缘化的。作为比较，还叠加了Hojjati等人[22]的推断值（均值和标准差）。所有后验都是单峰且约束良好的，除了B 1608 + 656的\(\Delta t_{{AB}}\)，它显示出一个微弱突出的次峰。数值均值和标准差也显示在表2中。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Comparison of the time delay posterior values for the quasars WFI J2033 – 4723 , B 1608 + 656 and HE 0435 – 1223 (Figure 3 ) with those from Hojjati et al. [ 22 ] . The values were calculated by marginalising over the model choices in Figure 2 . The results in Hojjati et al. [ 22 ] were obtained for the exponential (DRW) and Matérn-3/2 kernels. All time delays are in units of days.
figures.caption_zh: 表2：类星体WFI J2033 – 4723、B 1608 + 656和HE 0435 – 1223（图3）的时间延迟后验值与Hojjati等人[22]结果的比较。这些值是通过在图2的模型选择上边缘化计算得出的。Hojjati等人[22]的结果是针对指数（DRW）和Matérn-3/2核获得的。所有时间延迟的单位为天。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Scatter of the light curve data points around the mean function of the GP fit in units of magnitude. The distribution of the residuals is expected to follow a normal distribution. For comparison, a Gaussian distribution with the same mean and standard deviation is shown as well. For WFI J2033 – 4723 and B 1608 + 656 , the agreement in the tails is better than in the bulk. For HE 0435 – 1223 , the observed deviation from the exact Gaussian on the left half is attributed to a mis-fit resulting from lack of permutation-invariance of the GP model.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：光变曲线数据点围绕GP拟合均值函数的散点图，单位为星等。残差的分布预期遵循正态分布。作为比较，还显示了具有相同均值和标准差的高斯分布。对于WFI J2033 – 4723和B 1608 + 656，尾部的吻合度优于主体部分。对于HE 0435 – 1223，左半部分观察到的与精确高斯的偏差归因于GP模型缺乏置换不变性导致的拟合不佳。

title: The Dark Side of the Moon: Listening to Scalar-Induced Gravitational Waves
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures, 1 appendix with 1 additional figures
summary: The collapse of large-amplitude primordial curvature perturbations into planetary-mass primordial black holes generates a scalar-induced gravitational wave background in the $μ$Hz frequency range that may be detectable by future Lunar Laser Ranging and Satellite Laser Ranging data. We derive projected constraints on the primordial black hole population from a null detection of stochastic gravitational wave background by these experiments, including the impact of the electroweak phase transition on the abundance of planetary-mass primordial black holes. We also discuss the connection between the obtained projected constraints and the recent microlensing observations by the HSC collaboration of the Andromeda Galaxy.

AI.tldr: 该研究探讨了通过月球激光测距和卫星激光测距数据探测μHz频段引力波背景，以约束行星质量原初黑洞的丰度，并讨论了与HSC微引力透镜观测的联系。
AI.motivation: 研究旨在利用未来月球激光测距和卫星激光测距数据探测μHz频段的标量诱导引力波背景，从而约束行星质量原初黑洞的丰度，并探讨电弱相变对原初黑洞形成的影响。
AI.method: 通过推导原初曲率扰动坍缩形成原初黑洞时产生的标量诱导引力波背景，分析其在μHz频段的特征，并基于月球激光测距和卫星激光测距的零探测结果，建立对原初黑洞丰度的约束模型。
AI.result: 研究得出未来激光测距实验对原初黑洞丰度的预期约束，并分析了电弱相变对行星质量原初黑洞丰度的影响，同时建立了与HSC对仙女座星系微引力透镜观测结果的联系。
AI.conclusion: 月球激光测距和卫星激光测距数据有望为行星质量原初黑洞的丰度提供重要约束，这些约束与微引力透镜观测相互补充，有助于深入理解原初黑洞的形成机制和早期宇宙物理。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 大幅度的原初曲率扰动坍缩成行星质量原初黑洞，会在μHz频率范围内产生一个标量诱导的引力波背景，未来的月球激光测距和卫星激光测距数据可能探测到该信号。我们推导了在这些实验对随机引力波背景的零探测情况下，对原初黑洞群落的投影约束，包括电弱相变对行星质量原初黑洞丰度的影响。我们还讨论了所获得的投影约束与HSC合作组最近对仙女座星系的微引力透镜观测之间的联系。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要的总结：月球激光测距和卫星激光测距数据有望为行星质量原初黑洞的丰度提供重要约束，这些约束与微引力透镜观测相互补充，有助于深入理解原初黑洞的形成机制和早期宇宙物理。
